title: Senior Software Engineer - ECIL Holdings Services - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - ECIL Holdings Services - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
ECIL Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ECIL Holdings Services:
ECIL Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL Holdings Services!
jsonLd.skills: React, MongoDB, Java, Machine Learning, Docker, SQL, Kubernetes, Python
